title: potentilla alpestris var. baldensis
intro: Potentilla alpestris var. baldensis, also known as Alpine Cinquefoil, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Potentilla alpestris var. baldensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate gastrointestinal disorders, and exhibit antimicrobial and antiviral effects, thereby supporting immune function and overall well-being. In herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and its aerial parts are used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including digestive problems and respiratory issues.
